prompts.SessionStart: forge bellows pumping air into furnace with roaring flame ignition, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.SessionEnd: forge fire banked for the night with dying ember crackle, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.Stop: heavy blacksmith hammer ringing final strike on cooling iron, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.PreToolUse: tongs gripping hot iron and lifting it from forge coals, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.PostToolUse: industrial stamp pressing down with authoritative mechanical force, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.PermissionPrompt: pressure gauge entering caution zone with brass alert whistle, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.IdlePrompt: forge coals glowing with slow rhythmic bellows creak, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.SubagentStart: distribution valve opening new flow path with brass click, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.SubagentStop: hot finished piece dropped into quench bucket with sharp hiss, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: heavy lever pulled firmly to activate launching mechanism, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
